title: HTML Asset
description: HTML content asset, deliverable inline (HTML markup as a string) or by URL (zip bundle URL, third-party display tag URL). The optional `delivery_type` follows the VAST/DAAST naming convention; absence implies inline for backwards compatibility with v1 producers.

asset_type.description: Discriminator identifying this as an HTML asset. See /schemas/creative/asset-types for the registry.

accessibility.description: Self-declared accessibility properties for this opaque creative

alt_text.description: Text alternative describing the creative content

keyboard_navigable.description: Whether the creative can be fully operated via keyboard

motion_control.description: Whether the creative respects prefers-reduced-motion or provides pause/stop controls

screen_reader_tested.description: Whether the creative has been tested with screen readers

provenance.description: Provenance metadata for this asset, overrides manifest-level provenance

oneOf.title: Inline HTML content
oneOf.description: HTML markup delivered as a string. Default when `delivery_type` is absent (v1-compatible).

delivery_type.description: Optional discriminator. Absence is treated as inline.

oneOf.title: URL-delivered HTML
oneOf.description: HTML content served at a URL endpoint (e.g., HTML5 banner zip, third-party display tag).

delivery_type.description: Discriminator indicating HTML is delivered via URL endpoint.

url.description: URL endpoint that serves the HTML content (zip bundle, third-party tag URL, etc.).
